messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.

messages.message: Arrow function has a complexity of 13. Maximum allowed is 8.

Explicitly treat nullish value the same as an empty string (`value ?? ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Function 'useUsersState' has too many lines (127). Maximum allowed is 60.
Unexpected string value in conditional. An explicit empty string check is required.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)
Change condition to check for empty string (`value !== ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Unexpected nullable boolean value in conditional. Please handle the nullish case explicitly.

suggestions.desc: Explicitly treat nullish value the same as false (`value ?? false`)
Change condition to check if true (`value === true`)

messages.message: Prefer using nullish coalescing operator (`??`) instead of a logical or (`||`), as it is a safer operator.

suggestions.desc: Fix to nullish coalescing operator (`??`).
